$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all agent workflow-guard hook registrations. Edit ONLY this file, then run `node scripts/generate-agent-hooks.js --write` to render every surface. `--check` (used by check-workflow-closeout.js) re-renders and diffs against the live/template files so drift fails closed. All three surfaces share one guard script; --agent distinguishes them.

claude.description: Claude Code CLI. May keep stricter tool-lifecycle hooks than Codex, but Stop closeout semantics stay aligned. Scope is recovered inside the guard script (early-exit when cwd is outside CODEX_ROOT and the prompt has no codex route), so global registration no longer pollutes unrelated sessions while still covering codex subdirectories/worktrees that Claude's no-parent-walk hook discovery would otherwise miss.

codex.description: Codex Desktop and Codex CLI share ~/.codex/hooks.json (enabled by config.toml hooks=true). Low-noise: SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/Stop only; PreToolUse/PostToolUse must NOT be enabled here.
